# Render prognostic outcome cell with background color based on actionability tier (Generated by Claude Opus 4.6 with some manual tweaks)

Render prognostic outcome cell with background color based on
actionability tier (Generated by Claude Opus 4.6 with some manual
tweaks)

## Usage

``` r
render_prognostic_outcome(data, tier_colors)
```

## Arguments

- data:

  The main data frame (passed via closure)

- tier_colors:

  Named list with `t1` and `t2` hex colors for tiers 1 and 2
